mapper.select: select task_code, task_type, period_type, trigger_event_type, target_value, reward_growth_delta, reward_balance_delta, claim_required, display_order, status, create_time, update_time from task_template where trigger_event_type = #{triggerEventType} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by display_order asc, task_code asc

select task_code, task_type, period_type, trigger_event_type, target_value, reward_growth_delta, reward_balance_delta, claim_required, display_order, status, create_time, update_time from task_template where status = 'ACTIVE' order by display_order asc, task_code asc
